name: Zambean House Blend
description: Our signature roast — smooth, medium-bodied with notes of dark chocolate and citrus. Sourced from Zambian and Ethiopian beans.
pairing: Pairs perfectly with our Carrot Cake Muffin — K140 combo

name: Cappuccino
description: Double espresso with velvety steamed milk and a cloud of foam. The Lusaka favorite.

name: Espresso
description: Short, intense, perfect. Single-origin Zambian arabica pulled to order.

name: Iced Latte
description: Double espresso over ice with cold milk. Essential Lusaka afternoon fuel.

name: Moccachino
description: Espresso, steamed milk, and house-made chocolate sauce. Rich, indulgent.

name: French Press
description: Single-origin Zambian coffee, full-immersion brewed. Bold, clean, and full-flavored.

name: Americano
description: Double espresso lengthened with hot water. Smooth, rich, and endlessly drinkable.

name: Café Latte
description: Velvety steamed milk poured over a double espresso. Smooth and creamy.

name: Flat White
description: Double ristretto with micro-foamed milk. Strong, silky, the Antipodean way.

name: Macchiato
description: Espresso stained with a dollop of steamed milk. Bold with just a touch of creaminess.

name: Hot Chocolate
description: Rich Belgian cocoa steamed with whole milk. Topped with whipped cream.

name: Milo
description: The classic malt chocolate drink — steamed, frothy, and nostalgic.

name: The Full English
description: Two fried eggs, crispy bacon, fried tomato, pork sausage, baked beans, mushrooms and toast.

name: Avo on Toast
description: Mashed avo on toast served with an egg. Simple, fresh, and perfectly seasoned.

name: Vanilla French Toast
description: French toast made from our homemade bread served with crispy bacon, golden syrup and a touch of vanilla.

name: Vegan Breakfast
description: Creamy avo, caramelized onions, fried mushrooms, roasted tomato and baked beans served on a toasted baguette.

name: Blue Cheese Toast
description: Sliced avo, grilled tomato, fried egg, crumbled blue cheese and crispy bacon on sourdough toast.

name: Bacon Scrambled Eggs
description: Creamy scrambled eggs with crispy bacon, mushrooms, avo with fried tomato on a toasted baguette.

name: Bacon & Egg Roll
description: Two fried eggs in a fresh, lightly toasted sesame bun with crispy bacon.

name: Eggs Benedict
description: English muffin, poached egg with a choice of ham or bacon served with Hollandaise sauce.

name: Granola & Yoghurt
description: Homemade granola with Greek yoghurt and fresh seasonal fruit.

name: Farmer's Breakfast
description: Two fried eggs, fried tomato, sweetcorn fritters, pork sausage and chips.

name: Breakfast Croissant
description: Creamy scrambled eggs with crispy bacon and fried tomato on a freshly baked butter croissant.

name: Eggs Royale
description: English muffin, poached egg, smoked salmon with Hollandaise sauce.

name: Omelettes
description: Three-egg omelette with three fillings of your choice: mushroom, cheddar, tomato, bacon, feta, jalapeño, ham, onion, avo.

name: Philly Cheese Steak
description: Thin-sliced beef, melted cheese, caramelized onions, and peppers on a toasted roll. Our #1 seller. Served with chips & salad.
pairing: Try with our Iced Latte — the perfect contrast

name: Beef Cheese Burger
description: Beef pattie, tomato, caramelized onions, lettuce and gherkins. Served with chips & salad.

name: Smoked Chicken Salad
description: Sliced smoked chicken, honey mustard dressing, lettuce, feta, pecan nuts, avo, pumpkin and sunflower seeds.

name: Margherita Flatbread
description: Crispy flatbread with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, garden basil.

name: Chicken & Halloumi Wrap
description: Halloumi, crumbed chicken, lettuce, avo, tomato and honey mustard mayo. Served with chips & salad.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Falafel, tomato, cucumber, lettuce and tahini yogurt dressing. Served with chips & salad.

name: Bacon & Blue Cheese Burger
description: Beef pattie, bacon, blue cheese sauce, tomato and lettuce. Served with chips & salad.

name: T-Bone Steak
description: Grilled T-bone with homemade mushroom sauce. Served with chips & salad or mash & veg.

name: Chicken Schnitzel
description: Crispy crumbed chicken breast with cheese sauce. Served with chips & salad or mash & veg.

name: Ham & Cheese Toastie
description: Classic toasted sandwich with ham and melted cheese. Served with chips & salad.

name: Mozzarella, Tomato & Pesto Toastie
description: Fresh mozzarella, tomato and basil pesto on toasted artisan bread. Served with chips & salad.

name: Garden Salad
description: Fresh lettuce, sundried tomatoes, feta, pecan nuts, avo, pumpkin and sunflower seeds.

name: The Italian Sandwich
description: Homemade basil pesto, Italian salami, sundried tomatoes and parmesan shavings. Served with chips & salad.

name: Club Sandwich
description: Grilled chicken, crispy bacon, lettuce, tomato and honey Dijon mayo. Served with chips & salad.

name: Smoked Salmon Salad
description: Thinly sliced salmon on a bed of fresh lettuce with capers, feta, avo, pumpkin and sunflower seeds.

name: Carrot Cake Muffin
description: Moist spiced carrot cake muffin with cream cheese frosting. Baked fresh every morning.
pairing: Cappuccino + Carrot Cake Muffin — K160 combo

name: Plain Butter Croissant
description: Buttery, flaky croissant baked on-site. Perfect with a morning coffee.

name: Lemon Drizzle Cake
description: Zesty lemon cake soaked in citrus syrup with a crackling sugar top.

name: Chocolate Brownie
description: Rich, fudgy dark chocolate brownie. The ultimate coffee companion.

name: Banana Choc Chip Muffin
description: Ripe Zambian bananas folded into a chocolate-flecked muffin. Sweet, moist, irresistible.

name: Cinnamon Roll
description: Soft, gooey cinnamon roll with cream cheese glaze. Warm from the oven.

name: Double Chocolate Muffin
description: Deep cocoa muffin studded with dark chocolate chunks. For serious chocolate lovers.

name: Fresh Orange Juice
description: Cold-pressed from local Zambian oranges. Nothing added.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Creamy yogurt blended with ripe Zambian mangoes and a hint of cardamom.

name: Hibiscus Iced Tea
description: House-brewed hibiscus tea, chilled and lightly sweetened. Incredibly refreshing.

name: Homemade Passion Fruit
description: Fresh passion fruit cordial made in-house. Sweet, tangy, and bursting with tropical flavor.

name: Rock Shandy
description: Half lemonade, half soda, a splash of bitters. The ultimate refresher on a hot Lusaka day.

name: Fruit Smoothie
description: Blended seasonal fruit with yogurt and honey. Thick, creamy, and energizing.

name: Milkshake
description: Thick, old-school milkshake. Choose chocolate, vanilla, or strawberry.

name: Rooibos Tea
description: Naturally caffeine-free South African red bush tea. Smooth and earthy with a hint of sweetness.

name: 5 Roses Tea
description: The classic black tea — strong, golden, and comforting.

name: Green Tea
description: Light, delicate, and packed with antioxidants. Steamed to perfection.

name: Red Cappuccino
description: Rooibos tea prepared like a cappuccino — steamed milk and velvety foam. Caffeine-free comfort.

name: Lemon Ginger Water
description: Fresh ginger, lemon, and honey steeped in hot water. Warming and soothing.

name: Fresh Red
description: A vibrant infusion of red berries and hibiscus. Bright, tart, and refreshing.

name: Chicken Strips & Chips
description: Crispy chicken strips served with chips and mashed avo. Kid-approved.

name: Fish Cakes & Chips
description: Golden fish cakes served with chips and mushy peas.

name: Beef Bolognese
description: Hearty beef bolognese over pasta. Wholesome and filling.

name: Creamy Mac 'n Cheese
description: Creamy macaroni cheese. Add bacon bits or peas +K25.

name: Aperol Spritz
description: Aperol, Prosecco, soda. Bright, bittersweet, and perfectly refreshing for the garden.

name: Mimosa
description: Fresh orange juice topped with sparkling wine. The brunch essential.

name: Irish Coffee
description: Fresh espresso, Irish whiskey, brown sugar, and cream. The ultimate after-dinner warmer.

name: Sauvignon Blanc
description: Crisp, dry white wine with zesty citrus notes. By the glass.

name: Local Beer
description: Zambia's finest — ice cold Mosi or Castle. The garden essential.

name: Cider
description: Crisp, chilled apple cider. Light and refreshing.
